description:
Stoat for Desktop – application for Windows

Community-focused messaging application with modern chat features, fine-grained permissions, moderation tools, bot integration, and privacy protection. Open-source and GDPR compliant.
1.4.1 (2026-07-16)
Bug Fixes
- Do not enable autostart on first launch (#237) (e00f3a8)
- make electron use loopback instead of loopbackwithmute (#236) (1940938)
